label: Physical product / hardware + SaaS planning — must not emit sandbox build output

messages.content: I want to make a temperature + humidity sensor and wire this into my wall. I want my own hardware with a screen and UI to display graphs over time, date-vs-date comparison, leak alerts, admin SaaS dashboard, hardware sourcing from China, casing/enclosure, and a path to sell this as a product. What hardware can I order and how should I plan this?
Compare sensor and MCU options for a Wi-Fi indoor air-quality monitor. I need a rough BOM, sourcing notes, enclosure risks, and what to validate before ordering 50 prototype units.
